LibeRality external validation

PASS

Generated 2026-07-18T23:49:54.018Z. Complete population-FO Fisher matrices were compared after harmonising residual-error parameterisation.

Engine versions

LibeRality 0.1.1 · PopED 0.7.0 · PFIM 7.0.3

Coverage

fixtureenginestatusreason
oral_proportionalPopED validated
oral_proportionalPFIM validated
bolus_additivePopED validated
bolus_additivePFIM validated
oral_combinedPopED validated
oral_combined PFIM not supported by common convention PFIM 7.0.3 implements Combined1 as (a + b*f)^2; the independent additive-plus-proportional variance a^2 + b^2*f^2 is not available.

Matched D-optimal grid search

enginecandidate_timelog_determinantd_optimality
LibeRality0.1 41.23505 361.6661
PopED 0.1 41.23505361.6661
PFIM 0.1 41.23505361.6661

Interpretation

The pass/fail decision applies to the conventional block-diagonal population-FO approximation shared by PopED and PFIM. LibeRality's default full-Gaussian mode remains available and intentionally includes additional fixed-effect covariance information.
